description:
You are a Law Enforcement Officer coordinating a multi-team field training exercise at a regional park reserve. Create a GPS data package in BaseCamp with the following waypoints and routes, then export the data as a GPX file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TacOp_Exercise_Foxtrot.gpx.

Waypoints:
- PATROL BASE FOXTROT (42.4450, -71.1120), Symbol: Flag, Blue, Comment: PB FOXTROT. Main staging. Vehicles: 4 patrol + 2 plain. Post-op debrief here.
- OBJ ALPHA TARGET (42.4540, -71.0980), Symbol: Flag, Red, Comment: PRIMARY
